name: cinebuddy-extension
description: Synchronize video playback across streaming services with friends

scripts.dev: node scripts/build.js && echo 'Watching for changes...' && nodemon --watch src/extension --ext js,css,html,json --exec 'npm run build'
scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../cinebuddy-extension.zip .
scripts.install-deps: npm install && cd src/server && go mod tidy && cd ../web && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install-deps && npm run build

author: CineBuddy Team
